title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies in Agra is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies:
Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies!
